Title: Disobedience
Writer: Sebastián Lelio, Rebecca Lenkiewicz, Naomi Alderman
Actors: Rachel Weisz, Rachel McAdams, Alessandro Nivola
Plot: From a screenplay by Sebastián Lelio and Rebecca Lenkiewicz, the film follows a woman as she returns to her Orthodox Jewish community that shunned her decades earlier for an attraction to a female childhood friend. Once back, their passions reignite as they explore the boundaries of faith and sexuality. Based on Naomi Alderman's book, the film stars Rachel Weisz, Rachel McAdams and Alessandro Nivola.
Country: Ireland, United Kingdom, United States, Belgium
